data.title: TransUnion Reports Strong Q4 On Growth In US & International Markets, Announces $500 Million Buyback Plan & More
data.description: TransUnion (NYSE: TRU) reported Q4 revenue of $1.037B, beating consensus of $1.027B. Adjusted EBITDA up 16% to $378M. Expects 4.5-6% organic revenue growth in 2025.

data.title: Apple Is Back With Ads On X After Halting Platform Spending In 2023 Over Elon Musk's Posts
data.description: Apple is back advertising on X after a 15-month break. Here's a look at the first ads Apple is running.

data.title: New Leveraged ETFs Let Traders Bet Big On Dell, Intel, Qualcomm
data.description: GraniteShares has launched 3 leveraged single-stock ETFs for Dell, Intel, and Qualcomm. These funds aim to amplify exposure to these tech stocks and are the first of their kind.

data.title: Airbnb Stock Is Rallying – Will Q4 Earnings Keep The Momentum Alive?
data.description: Airbnb (ABNB) to report Q4 earnings on Thursday. EPS expected at 58 cents, revenues at $2.42B. Stock down 7.21% past year, 6.44% YTD. Charts show strong bullish signals.

data.title: Robert F. Kennedy, Vaccine Skeptic, Confirmed As Trump's Secretary Of Health: Health Care Stocks To Watch
data.description: The U.S. Senate voted on Thursday to confirm President Donald Trump's nomination of Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to lead the Department of Health and Human Services.
